title: Divinn's TastesLikeVanilla
description: A vanilla feeling modpack while still having the true modded experience with the inclusion of OG mods like The Aether, Tinker's Construct, Mutant Monsters and Botania.
body: # Divinn's TastesLikeVanilla modpack provides a vanilla feel while still keeping the true modded experience. **_I recommend at least 8GBs RAM allocated to run this modpack. Less RAM may work_** ## **Features:** - **Cobblemon** revamped with addons allowing for more pokemon and mega evolutions - **Magic** with Botania and Archery Magic - **Make powerful new tools and weapons** with Tinkers Construct and Mythic Metals - **Dimensions** to explore with powerful bosses and exciting loot - **Traverse** your world flying in planes, sailing the seas or driving around - **New Food and Drinks** giving stat boosts and further saturation - **Create**, for your automation dreams - **Optimisation** to run the big mod count - **Multiplayer friendly** with configs changed to keep the multiplayer experience fun ## **Explore a revamped Vanilla world with new mobs, animals, animations, visuals, and things to do.** Please join the discord if you have any questions or problems or if you just want updates or discussions about the modpack. Thank you ## **FTB Quests Credit** Not all of the FTB quests pages were made by me, I would like to credit the ones I did copy, all other FTB quests in-game that aren't listed here were made by me. If you would like to use my FTB quests pages in your modpack, feel free to do so. - Twilight Forest - **Wolkenparadies by marlester__** (Translated by me) - Cobblemon, PokeAgriculture, Create, Ore Collection, Trinkets, Plushie Collection, Aircraft, Automobiles, Boats, Wings, Farmer's Delight, Vinery, Brewery, Tom's Simple Storage - **BigChadGuys Plus (w Cobblemon) by jflec** - Soul Weaponry, The Nether, The End, The Otherside, Overworld, Moon, Mars, Venus, Mercury, Glacio, Botania, Transmogrification - **Prominence II RPG Hasturian Era by ElocinDev** ## **Shaders and Resourcepack Credits** This modpack uses the **Create Immersive Aircraft by nicky__21** resourcepack to change the look of some of the Immersive Aircraft mod textures. https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack This modpack also uses **ComplementaryReimagined Modified by BCG** shaders and I acknowledge that any problems that arise from using this pack is entirely under my responsibility. The original Complentary Reimagined Shaders can be found here [https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) ## **BCG x AllTheMons** BCG x AllTheMons provides implementation of Pokemon that aren't in the base Cobblemon and also provides some updated Pokemon models. Credit to the authors of each mod that makes up the BCG x AllTheMons pack. **A huge thank you to the following authors:** **Allone**, the creator of _Allone's Additions_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/notsocobblemon-allones-additions **ASHISK**, the creator of _Ashimons_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/ashimons **BeeZy**, one of the creators of _LackingMons_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/lackingmons **BifeSalgado**, the creator of _OdysseyMons_ - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/odysseymons **Bwavii**, the creator of _WaviMons_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/wavimons-(cobblemon) **El Pigeon**, the creator of _Pigeon's PokePack_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/pigeons-poke-pack **Genotype**, the creator of _GenoMons_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/genomons **iMystxc**, the creator of _MysticMons_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/mysticmons **IZetyXX**, one of the creators of _LackingMons_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/lackingmons **Kale**, the creator of _Kale's Collection_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/kales-cobblemon-collection **LegenTM**, the creator of _HiddenMons_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/hiddenmons-cobblemon **NetImmerse**, the creator of _The Jewel Pokemon_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-jewel-pokmon-cobblemon **Raspix**, the creator of _CobbleCats_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobble-cats **RedRibbon**, the creator of _MissingMons_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon **Salt**, the creator of _SaltMons_ - https://modrinth.com/datapack/saltmons **YaBoiBruno**, the creator of _MoreMons_ - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/moremons ---
